Explanation:
The "leaders" refer to the premiers' scores in goals.behinds (total) format. Counting the premiers' goals:
- 2003: 14 (>10)
- 2004: 17 (>10)
- 2005: 19 (>10)
- 2006: 11 (>10)
- 2007: 14 (>10)
- 2008: 12 (>10)
- 2009: 9 (<10)
- 2010: 8 (<10)
- 2011: 11 (>10)
- 2012: 17 (>10)
- 2013: 14 (>10)

More than ten goals: 9 instances (2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2011, 2012, 2013).
Exactly ten goals: 0 instances.

Therefore, the Prediction Answer "9|0" is correct.
